description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow named ci that runs on push to main, pull requests to main, and on a scheduled cron job at 12:00 daily. The workflow has four jobs: macos sonoma 14 arm on macos-14, ros 2 humble on ubuntu-latest in an ubuntu:jammy container, ubuntu 22.04 jammy on ubuntu-latest in an ubuntu:jammy container, and ubuntu 22.04 jammy apt on ubuntu-latest in an ubuntu:jammy container. Each job checks out the repository, sets up the environment, and runs various build and test scripts. The workflow also cancels any in-progress runs when a new commit is added to a pull request.
